description: Canonical error taxonomy for Organism. Mirrors packages/shared/src/error-taxonomy.ts. Used by Agent Lightning (Week 9) as reward signal labels.

errors.name: TASK_CHECKOUT_CONFLICT
errors.description: Two agents tried to check out the same task
errors.cause: Race condition in task assignment or duplicate task creation
errors.remediation: Atomic SQLite checkout prevents this — investigate if it still occurs

errors.name: BUDGET_CAP_EXCEEDED
errors.description: Agent hit its daily hard budget ceiling
errors.cause: Too many tasks, expensive model, or unexpected token usage
errors.remediation: Check agent spend in dashboard. Raise cap if justified. Check for doom loops.

errors.name: GATE_BLOCKED
errors.cause: Tests failed, quality below threshold, or Rafael rejected at G4
errors.remediation: Read gate rejection reason. Fix the underlying issue. Resubmit.

errors.name: DOOM_LOOP_DETECTED
errors.cause: Agent calling same action 3+ times with no progress
errors.remediation: Break the loop: add stop condition. Escalate to CEO if stuck.

errors.name: MCP_CONTRACT_VIOLATION
errors.description: PraisonAI attempted to perform orchestration (task creation, scheduling, budget write)
errors.cause: PraisonAI sidecar exceeded its authorized tool surface
errors.remediation: Check server.py for unauthorized tools. This should never happen.

errors.name: LOW_CONFIDENCE_FINDING
errors.description: Quality Guardian found something it could not verify from 2+ independent angles
errors.cause: Insufficient evidence for a reported issue
errors.remediation: Guardian should discard, not report. Update Guardian prompts if this fires.

errors.name: QUALITY_SCORE_BELOW_THRESHOLD
errors.description: Output quality score below the lane's minimum threshold
errors.remediation: Return to executing agent for rework. Check agent CLAUDE.md.

errors.name: BROWSER_VERIFICATION_FAILED
errors.description: Guardian Playwright spec failed or timed out
errors.cause: Dev server not running, page error, or spec written incorrectly
errors.remediation: Check if dev server is running. Clean up tmp_guardian_*.spec.ts.

errors.name: AUTO_FIX_REGRESSION
errors.description: Guardian's auto-fix made the platform health score worse
errors.cause: Guardian applied a fix that introduced a new issue
errors.remediation: Revert the patch. Flag to G4 gate. Update Guardian's safe-fix criteria.

errors.name: MCP_SIDECAR_UNREACHABLE
errors.description: PraisonAI MCP server did not respond
errors.cause: Python sidecar crashed or not started

errors.name: SECRET_MISSING
errors.description: A declared required secret is not present
errors.cause: API key not set in environment or .secrets.json
errors.remediation: Add the secret to .env or .secrets.json. Never commit it.

errors.name: SECRET_EXPIRED
errors.description: A secret is older than 90 days

errors.name: STATE_DB_LOCKED
errors.description: SQLite tasks.db is locked by another process
errors.cause: Another process has an exclusive lock
errors.remediation: WAL mode should prevent this. Kill stale processes if it persists.

errors.name: AGENT_TIMEOUT
errors.description: Agent session exceeded its maximum run time (30 minutes default)
errors.cause: Agent stuck, doom loop, or task too large
errors.remediation: Check audit log for last action. Break task into smaller pieces.

errors.name: SUBAGENT_SPAWN_FAILED
errors.description: Quality Guardian couldn't spawn one of its 6 parallel subagents
errors.cause: Resource constraints or Agent tool failure
errors.remediation: Check budget. Check if Opus token ceiling was hit.

errors.name: SHADOW_PROMOTION_BELOW_THRESHOLD
errors.description: Agent didn't meet the quality bar after 10 shadow runs
errors.cause: Agent CLAUDE.md instructions unclear or agent model insufficient
errors.remediation: Review shadow run outputs. Improve CLAUDE.md. Re-run shadow promotion.

errors.name: DEAD_LETTER_TIMEOUT
errors.description: Task was in_progress for >30 minutes with no heartbeat
errors.cause: Agent crashed, timed out, or lost connectivity
errors.remediation: CEO reviews dead letter queue daily. Re-route or cancel the task.
